description: Address 5 review issues: StaggerReveal grid breakage, missing prefers-reduced-motion, circular font variable, invalid Tailwind arbitrary value syntax, and reduced contrast on card titles.
steps: STEP 1 - Remove StaggerReveal wrapper from page.tsx and apply animate-stagger-fade-in class + --stagger-delay inline style directly on each Card element so col-span/row-span grid classes work correctly
STEP 2 - Add @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) rules in globals.css that set animation: none and opacity: 1 on animated classes

STEP 3 - Fix circular font variable references in @theme inline block: rename --font-display to --font-family-display and --font-body to --font-family-body so Tailwind generates utility classes without self-referencing
STEP 4 - Fix invalid arbitrary value syntax: change to-oklch(...) to to-[oklch(...)] in sidebar layout
STEP 5 - Change text-card-foreground/80 to text-card-foreground for full contrast on card titles
acceptance_criteria: Bento grid col-span and row-span classes are applied directly to Card elements (no wrapper div between grid and cards)
prefers-reduced-motion media query sets animation: none and opacity: 1
Font variables in @theme inline use --font-family-display and --font-family-body namespace
Sidebar gradient uses square bracket syntax for arbitrary oklch value
Card titles use full text-card-foreground without opacity modifier
